mechanism_narrative: A downward move in FEDFUNDS lowers the discount rate on equity cash flows and supports risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month when policy is easing rather than flat.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX forward returns are not higher after FEDFUNDS declines than after flat or rising FEDFUNDS, or if the signal's rolling Rank IC stays below 0.03 for any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening labor demand and higher recession risk, which should pressure equities lower over the next quarter as earnings expectations are revised down.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE rises are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases, or if the sign of the effect is positive in a rolling 3-year evaluation window.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both improve together, the market should read this as broad-based demand strength and a healthier revenue outlook, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if joint improvements in RSAFS and PAYEMS do not outperform either series alone, or if the combined signal fails to produce positive 20-day returns in at least 55% of activated periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in INDPRO indicates weakening industrial production and margin pressure, which should lead equities lower over the next month as cyclical earnings expectations are cut.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX returns are not negative after INDPRO declines relative to its recent trend, or if the effect flips positive for a sustained 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in HOUST reflects stronger housing demand and spillover activity into consumption and construction, which supports equity prices over the next quarter through improved growth expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if housing breakouts fail to produce positive 60-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the conditional mean return after triggers is not above the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: If PAYEMS rises while UNRATE falls, labor market slack is shrinking and household income momentum is improving, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined PAYEMS-minus-UNRATE signal does not outperform the single-series components, or if 20-day forward returns are not positive in at least 60% of instances where payrolls rise and unemployment falls.

mechanism_narrative: A high FEDFUNDS rate in a tightening regime raises financing costs and compresses equity valuations, so the expected S&P 500 return over the next week is negative when policy remains restrictive.
failure_condition: Reject if restrictive FEDFUNDS readings are followed by nonnegative 5-day SPX returns in a majority of cases, or if the effect disappears once the rate is above 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: When GDP and retail sales both accelerate together after a soft patch, the economy is re-accelerating and equity earnings expectations should rise, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous GDP and sales acceleration does not yield positive 60-day SPX returns, or if the joint signal is not stronger than either proxy alone in rolling out-of-sample tests.
